use_cases: Display product categories or status labels in e-commerce interfaces
Show system status indicators in dashboards and monitoring tools
Present tag clouds for content organization in CMS platforms
Indicate feature availability or subscription tiers in SaaS applications
Mark notification counts or priority levels in messaging interfaces
ai_summary: A lightweight badge component with four style variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) for displaying status indicators, tags, and category labels across various interfaces. Built with class-variance-authority for consistent variant management and Tailwind CSS for styling.
